discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Model-computed p = 0.0101 for Fisher's exact test on 2x2 contingency (G1: 7/8 methylated vs G2: 1/8 methylated) is consistent with the reported p < 0.01. The value 0.0101 rounds to 0.01 and is at the boundary of the reported threshold. Within ±10% relative difference tolerance.
